Things don't slack, like let's work asynchronously more, you know, send us ideas, feedback, questions, like we're here to help, you know?

So I'll end with that of just saying like make this more of a collaboration with our clients, bring them along, bring some creativity and have some fun with them, you know, and show them the process, right?
Show them the work you're putting in, don't just show them the output and then they'll have a little more empathy and when you want to have empathy from both sides, right?
Were they empathized with all that you're doing for them?
and you understand their day to day what they care about and you build that trust.
Awesome.
Well, thanks everyone.
I really appreciate everyone and I'll send the recording here and we'll go from there, but it keeps sending us feedback and we're here to help.
Yeah, Jess, go ahead.
So I have one question about this and I did mention it to Kyle.
Going back like last week, I needed to pull something from or this week I had to point from the last team training.
It is really hard to see the screen on Fathom.
Is there any way to like, like, I don't know, like Daniels and like the looms are so much easier to see what's actually happening?
Is that like?
Yeah, that's a really good point.
Let me, it's been on my to-do list to get rid of Fathom.
Fathom is just
sucks.
Like, there's so many things that have annoyed that crap out of me.
And also, like, sometimes, like, some of that, like, Zoom is not that much better.
So obviously, like, Loom is going to be a lot better.

But if there's a part of the process that, like, really, you really needed to kind of see and, like, we can rerecord and, like, we're right now, like, we just put this on the calendar because it's live.
kind of forces us to, like, take the time, ask questions, collaborate a bit more.
But then, like, our goal is to keep recording these, like, micro lessons.
Right now, we're putting it in circle, right?
so we'll keep recording them.
It's just, like, we're trying to do as, like, kind of the trade-off between, like, okay, let's go record these versus let's go help you to work, you know?
So, we'll standing.
So if there's pieces of today or yesterday or last week or whatever, they're like, can you guys rerecord this?
Like, that's a lot easier because we know exactly what to rerecord and I can do it as a one.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Team training on programmatic SEO and content strategy, with a focus on improving processes and client collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Programmatic SEO requires building a robust, relational database of content elements (e.g., activities, attractions, destinations) to enable efficient content creation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Calibration process with clients is crucial for alignment and should be collaborative, focused, and iterative](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Balance between AI-assisted workflows and human oversight/enrichment is key for maintaining content quality and authority](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

## Topics

### Current State of Service-Software Integration

  - [Services market is 10-50x larger than software, presenting a massive opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [fwd.digital's unique position: combining marketing expertise with technical capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Emphasis on using available AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity) to enhance efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)

### Client Management and Expectations

  - [Recent success stories: Webflow partnership, potential $3M content syndication opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Importance of transparency and collaboration in client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Need for better communication of processes and behind-the-scenes work to clients](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

### Programmatic SEO Strategy

  - [Detailed walkthrough of database creation using Airtable for Adventures Group](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=2570.0)
  - [Creating interconnected fields: destinations, cities, activities, attractions](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=2883.0)
  - [Importance of continual database enrichment through both AI and human input](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=3560.0)
  - [URL structure considerations based on content depth and site architecture](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=4213.0)

### Content Calibration Process

  - [Goal: Get clients excited about one piece of content before scaling](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=4611.0)
  - [Steps: Understand client intent, provide focused options for feedback, iterate based on specific aspects (tone, structure, accuracy)](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=4725.0)
  - [Example: Using AI to rewrite content in different styles (e.g., TV character voice) for creative exploration](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=4862.0)

### SEO Industry Insights

  - [Analysis of recent Google update impacts (e.g., Healthline vs. HubSpot)](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=4560.0)
  - [Importance of building depth, authority, and value in content vs. shallow, high-volume approaches](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=4654.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Refine and document the programmatic SEO process for Adventures Group](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=4831.0)
  - [Implement more collaborative calibration processes with clients](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=5317.0)
  - [Continue building custom knowledge bases for clients to improve content accuracy and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=4653.0)
  - [Explore better screen-sharing tools for future team trainings (alternatives to Fathom)](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=5378.0)
  - [Record targeted micro-lessons on specific processes as needed for team reference](https://fathom.video/share/5zTH8r68PMfCMnyhq_qYTtPQQWxasTPK?tab=summary&timestamp=5432.0)

action_items.description: Research and outline programmatic content approach for Breda launch strategy meeting next week. Include how to leverage their broad offering vs competitors.

Create Airtable database for Adventures Group tours/attractions (120+ tours). Include fields for destinations, cities, activities, attractions. Enrich with descriptions, images, etc. as you build content.
Ask Daniel about building custom knowledge base from client-provided materials (e.g. Adventures Group tour info) to enhance content generation.
Propose URL structure for Adventures Group content (e.g. /what-to-do-in/[destination]/[activity] vs single URL structure). Present options to client.
Develop calibration process for Adventures Group. Include multiple options for intros, H2 sections. Focus on getting specific feedback on style, tone, accuracy, etc.
Initiate process to replace Fathom with better screen-sharing/recording solution for team trainings.
